sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, name) VALUES (1, 'HELLO WORLD');
UPDATE test_strings SET name = lcase(name) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, lcase(name) AS lowercase_name FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, name) VALUES (2, lcase('TEST STRING WITH UPPER CASE'));
